# Legal notice and privacy statement
The website www.qubit-pharmaceuticals.com (hereinafter the "Website") is edited by QUBIT PHARMACEUTICALS, a company organized under the laws of France, with its principal place of business located 29, rue du Faubourg Saint Jacques 75014 Paris, France, with the Paris Registry of Companies under File No. 883 649 238 (hereinafter "Qubit Pharmaceuticals").
Email: contact@qubit-pharmaceuticals.com
Website hosted by:   
Webflow
Publishing director and editor:   
Robert MARINO, CEO of Qubit Pharmaceuticals  
Webmaster: contact@qubit-pharmaceuticals.com
Consulting this Website by any Internet user (hereinafter the "User") automatically implies his approval and acceptance to the following terms of use.
#### **  
Purpose and content of the Website**
This Website is intended for all audiences, with the purpose of providing information on Qubit Pharmaceuticals, its organization and activities. 
Qubit Pharmaceuticals makes every effort to ensure that the information provided on this Website is reliable and up to date. The information and elements of this Website are provided for informational purposes only, and is provided as is, without any warranty of any kind, express or implied, and in particular but not limited to availability, accuracy or completeness.
This Website may contain links to other websites for accessibility purposes only, and Qubit Pharmaceuticals assumes no responsibility for the content of these websites. Access to these websites is the sole responsibility of the User.
Users may not create hyperlinks to this Website without Qubit Pharmaceuticals’ prior written consent.
#### **  
Liability**
Qubit Pharmaceuticals cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damage resulting from the use of all or part of the elements of the Website or from the use of information contained on this Website by User.
Qubit Pharmaceuticals does not in any way warrants that the functions contained on the Website or access to the Website will be warranted without interruption, inaccessibility or without error, or that the Website or the server which makes them available are free of any virus and other components. 
The liability of Qubit Pharmaceuticals cannot be directly or indirectly retained, for any reason.
#### **  
Intellectual property rights**
The Website and its content are owned and operated by Qubit Pharmaceuticals. The Website, including but not limited to text, software, video, sound, graphics, photographs, illustrations, names, logos, trademarks, and other material, is protected by intellectual property rights. 
The User may not use any of Qubit Pharmaceuticals’ trademarks or trade names without Qubit Pharmaceuticals’ prior express written consent and the User acknowledges that he has no ownership rights in and to any of those names and trademarks.
Reproduction of texts of this Website is authorized for any strictly private use of the User, and subject to the condition that the source is mentioned (© Qubit Pharmaceuticals). All other uses must be the subject of a prior written consent from Qubit Pharmaceuticals.
This Website may not be reproduced, distributed, modified, retransmitted, or published, in whole or in part, in any way whatsoever, without Qubit Pharmaceuticals’ prior written consent. Failure to comply with this provision constitutes an infringement.  
‍
#### **Cookies**
This Website doesn’t use third-party cookies (small text files stored on hard drive to record technical browsing information when visiting a website).
In case of modification and use of cookies, certain information might be recorded by Qubit Pharmaceuticals servers (browser used, IP address...) to enhance Users’ online experience and to gather statistics. None of the information recorded would consist of personal data and would not enable Qubit Pharmaceuticals to identify the User.  
‍
#### **Personal data**
Personal data regarding Users may be collected through this Website with the agreement of the User.
In the event of subscription to a service (newsletter, contact form.) on the Website, or request of a User, the data collected (last name, first name, addresses, contact details, etc.) is subject to processing intended solely for such purpose.
The legal basis for processing personal data is the pursuit of legitimate interests of Qubit Pharmaceuticals.
Qubit Pharmaceuticals complies with the data protection requirements of the European General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) No. 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of April 27, 2016, and the French Act of January 6, 1978 as amended.
User has a right to access, modify, rectify and suppress its personal data, by requesting it at: dpo@qubit-pharmaceuticals.com or by post at: QUBIT PHARMACEUTICALS - 29, rue du Faubourg Saint Jacques 75014 Paris, France,
In case of no response or dispute, User has the right to file a complaint with the Commission on Information Technology and Liberties (CNIL).
These personal data are intended to be used by Qubit Pharmaceuticals only and Qubit Pharmaceuticals is responsible for processing and preserving such data.  
‍
#### **Additional terms**
These terms and conditions will be governed by and construed according to the laws of France and disputes arising from such terms will be referred to the competent Court within the jurisdiction of the Court of Appeal of Paris, France.
Qubit Pharmaceuticals reserves the right of amending these terms and conditions at any time.
‍
